title: Orderbooks, Old Ships, and Sanctions
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2025-07-18_orderbooks-old-ships-and-sanctions_img_tankers-secondary_0d029e248e3f.jpg
Tanker ordering activity for vessels above 25,000 dwt has dropped sharply this year, with total orders around 110 units. This decline reflects a mix of regulatory and market uncertainties, along with persistently high newbuilding prices. Current prices remain just below the multiyear peaks seen last year, while shipyards face little pressure to offer significant discounts.
